name: team-keyed column on player subject with no year filter and no year split
description: Exercises the bridge-always-materializes path for a team-keyed measure on a player-subject query with no year filter and no year split. Coverage gap (a).
expected_query: with "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" as materialized (select "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team", sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team"), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2026]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2026) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2026) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays" AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2026 left join "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" on "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" group by player.fname, player.lname, "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
